name: Imagga Moderation
description: Imagga — image recognition API with NSFW, categorization, and custom classifier moderation endpoints.

seo.title: Imagga Moderation — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Imagga Moderation: Imagga — image recognition API with NSFW, categorization, and custom classifier moderation endpoints.

when_to_use: Running NSFW and adult content classification on image uploads
Building content safety pipelines for user photo sharing apps
Detecting explicit content before display with low latency API
Filtering image uploads in real time for community platforms

pros: Simple REST API, fast to integrate
cons: No video or text moderation in moderation tier
review.verdict: Good budget image moderation API with custom models, but not the sharpest tool for hard NSFW edge cases.
review.best_for: Startups and mid-market apps needing cheap image moderation plus category tagging.
review.not_for: Platforms with CSAM, deepfake, or high-stakes visual risk requirements.
